Short CV

Born in Bulgaria, 1977. She completed her education here until the 2. Class in middle school and settled in Turkey in 1991. She finished Hacı Halit Erkut High School in Değirmendere in 1995 and Marmara University School of Nursing in 1999. In 2003, she completed her master’s degree in Marmara University Health Sciences Institute Birth and Gynecology Nursing program and in 2011 she completed doctorate education in the same department. Between 1999-2004, he worked as a service nurse and then as a supervisor nurse at Özel Erdem Hospital. In 2004, she began to serve as a service nurse in Acıbadem Healthcare Group. She worked as High-risk pregnancies nurse, delivering room training nurse until 2009. In 2009, she served as a Clinical Quality Supervisor at the Quality Directorate of the group until November 2016. Since December 2016, she has assisted in the Department of Nursing at Üsküdar University, Faculty of Health Sciences as an Assoc. Prof. She is fluent in Bulgarian, and her English level is intermediate.
